name: tessera
description: Query the Tessera mosaic — your team's catalog of projects, packages, skills and tools.
long_description: Gives an agent the same view as the Tessera site: search the catalog, inspect a tessera and its relations, list everything of a type, or get a project's stack so you can mirror its standards. Reads the same data.json the mosaic uses, so humans and agents share one source of truth.

tools.name: tessera_search
tools.description: Find tesserae by free text, optionally filtered by type or tag.

tools.name: tessera_get
tools.description: One tessera with its relations (depends on, part of, relied on by, contains) and links.

tools.name: tessera_list
tools.description: List every tessera, or all of one field type.

tools.name: tessera_standards
tools.description: A project's stack (transitive deps + repo/doc links) to replicate its standards.

tools.name: tessera_stats
tools.description: Catalog overview: totals, by type, by state, last assembled.

data_source.title: Tessera data source
data_source.description: Local path to your docs/data.json OR the published https URL (e.g. https://<org>.github.io/tessera/data.json).
